oshi/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 21 to align with the target JDK version.
oshi/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 17, failing to utilize Java 21 features or potentially causing compatibility issues if the runtime is strictly Java 21.

oshi/pom.xml.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 dependency with JUnit Jupiter (JUnit 5) to modernize the testing framework.

oshi/src/test/java/com/example/AppTest.j.general_idea: Migrate JUnit 4 static import to JUnit 5 Jupiter API.
oshi/src/test/java/com/example/AppTest.j.why_exists: org.junit.Assert class does not exist in JUnit 5 Jupiter; compilation fails if JUnit 4 dependency is removed.

oshi/src/test/java/com/example/AppTest.j.general_idea: Migrate JUnit 4 Test annotation to JUnit 5 Jupiter API.
oshi/src/test/java/com/example/AppTest.j.why_exists: org.junit.Test class does not exist in JUnit 5 Jupiter; compilation fails if JUnit 4 dependency is removed.
